name: Client Code
description: An entity identifier that is not an LEI, used for Counterparty 2, Beneficiary 1, Other payment payer and/or Other payment receiver.
format: LEI of the Reporting Entity (or Execution agent) + up to 52 alphanumeric characters
optionalityRules: Required for new transaction report if entity eligible for LEI does not have LEI and LEI has not been applied for within 2 business days (Rule S1.3.1(2)(a)).
Required for new transaction report if entity is a natural person not eligible for an LEI (Rule S1.3.1(2)(b)).
valueRules: A unique Client Code in the format and structure of the LEI of the Reporting Entity (or of the Execution agent) followed by up to 52 characters (Paragraph 129(b)).
